rubric_metadata.name: Python/FastAPI Governance Best Practices
rubric_metadata.description: Framework-focused rubric for Python/FastAPI systems with governance and safety controls.

dimensions.name: API Contract Enforcement
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Validate typed request/response contracts and strict status handling.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Downgrade when API payloads are untyped or error handling is implicit.

dimensions.name: Concurrency and State Isolation
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Inspect async job handling, cancellation behavior, and run state isolation.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Critical shared mutable state risks reduce score to 2 or below.

dimensions.name: AST and Structural Verification
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Require AST parsing for structural checks and explicit fan-out/fan-in detection.

dimensions.name: Deterministic Arbitration
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Confirm ChiefJustice uses deterministic pure Python rules.
dimensions.judicial_logic: LLM synthesis in arbitration path is forbidden.
